inputs.label: Source Activity
inputs.businessContext: Enter the activity of the radioactive source in curies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the activity of the radioactive source in curies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Radyoaktif kaynağın aktivitesini curie cinsinden girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie die Aktivität der radioaktiven Quelle in Curie ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez l'activité de la source radioactive en curies.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese la actividad de la fuente radiactiva en curios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أدخل نشاط المصدر المشع بوحدة كوري.

inputs.label: Gamma Constant
inputs.businessContext: Specific gamma constant for the isotope in R*m²/(Ci*h).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific gamma constant for the isotope in R*m²/(Ci*h).
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Gammakonstante des Isotops in R·m²/(Ci·h).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante gamma spécifique de l'isotope en R*m²/(Ci*h).
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante gamma específica para el isótopo en R*m²/(Ci*h).
businessContext_i18n.ar: ثابت جاما النوعي للنظير بوحدة R*م²/(Ci*ساعة).

inputs.label: Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance from the source in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from the source in meters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Entfernung von der Quelle in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de la source en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde la fuente en metros.

inputs.label: Shield Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the shielding material in cm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the shielding material in cm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur du matériau de blindage en cm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor del material de blindaje en cm.

inputs.label: Half-Value Layer (HVL)
inputs.businessContext: Half-value layer of the shielding material for the gamma energy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Half-value layer of the shielding material for the gamma energy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gama enerjisi için zırh malzemesinin yarı değer kalınlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Halbwertsschicht des Abschirmmaterials für die Gammaenergie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Couche de demi-atténuation du matériau de blindage pour l'énergie gamma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Capa de valor medio del material de blindaje para la energía gamma.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طبقة نصف القيمة لمادة التدريع لطاقة جاما.

inputs.label: Dose Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor from exposure (R) to dose (µSv), typically 8.77 for air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor from exposure (R) to dose (µSv), typically 8.77 for air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maruziyetten (R) doza (µSv) dönüşüm faktörü, tipik olarak hava için 8.77.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umrechnungsfaktor von Exposition (R) in Dosis (µSv), typischerweise 8,77 für Luft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion de l'exposition (R) en dose (µSv), typiquement 8,77 pour l'air.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión de exposición (R) a dosis (µSv), típicamente 8.77 para aire.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل التحويل من التعرض (R) إلى الجرعة (µSv)، عادة 8.77 للهواء.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
